feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)

entry.title: YOU DREW FLOWERS AROUND MY SCARS
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,357Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: summary: You draw flowers around jason's scars in hopes of making him feel better about them.pairing: Jason Todd x Artist! fem!readerauthor's note: Jason has the Y-shaped scar, inaccuracies, body painting, flower symbolism, had this in my drafts for weeks and I just wanted this out lmao. Maybe OOC. soft fluff (hurt/comfort) , one mention of ER but nothing happens.cross posted on tumblr (@luviery)

entry.title: Of Things Red and Undead
entry.summary:
Author: Bat_brat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 153,611Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 1,221

Summary: After his time as the Arkham Knight and the events that followed, Jason Todd is on a journey for redemption. He was trying, anyway, until you came along. You’re no stranger to the shadows that lurk in Gotham’s undertow, but one fateful night, everything is turned upside down and suddenly nothing, nowhere, and no one is safe. Gotham is used to this though right? How much trouble could you possibly be? Especially when a vigilante with anger issues, trauma, and a plethora of guns makes it his personal mission to find out exactly what you are.

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,708Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,558Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

entry.title: Why can't you see me?
entry.summary:
Author: melliezz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,060Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 4

Summary: This is a DC series about batsis reader, who doesn't feel like she fits in, she's always feelt unwanted and like she doesn't belong, even in her own family, making her put all her time into school and over working herself. This had resulted in som deep scars that are getting harder to get rid off. What if this feeling takes over her life completely? What if she managed to get friends that she so badly wants to keep that she's willing to go so far to make her happy? Beware of the tags! This will go for the darker fanfics.

entry.title: And the world kept spinning (but you are my world)
entry.summary:
Author: Arbolitodenamu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,228Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: You move to Gotham thanks to the Wayne Scholarship for the GU. You're staying with a sweet old lady who seems to be very aware of the danger of the crime alley and who loves to share her pastries with her neighbor Jason. Or a fanfiction where you move to Gotham for college and all your deepest thoughts starts getting over your mind while your old friendships stars to fade away one more time. You only seem to find some calm with you new neighbor and you're scared to ruin it all.

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,136Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.summary:
Author: up_tonogood

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,202Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 102

Summary: Frankenstein! Jason Todd, set in the 1800s. Dick Grayson sails into the Arctic, chasing whispers that his lost brother, Jason, may still walk the world of the living. You are a young artist, hired for an Arctic exhibition, who becomes entangled in the Waynes's web of grief, rebirth, and a bunch of angsty monologues.

entry.title: In the Lowlight
entry.summary:
Author: magpietendencies (writtenintostars)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,840Chapters: 7/24Kudos: 161

Summary: There’s nothing recognizable about Jason, except maybe the way he zeroes in on you the second you step into the room. He always treated you that way, like you were what he was waiting for, the only reason he even showed up. “Jason.” You say when you remember how to talk again. You’re vaguely aware that you’re digging your nails into your palms. You tell yourself to blink, your eyes beginning to water, but you can’t bring yourself to, afraid you’ll find that Jason won’t be there anymore. “Hey, Mags,” the figure greets you, and it’s the first time anyone’s called you that in years. It makes sense that it would be Jason who uses the nickname. He gave it to you, after all. ~ You and Jason Todd spent your teen years together under Batman's tutelage and Bruce Wayne's care, your bond going much further than any words can describe. Six years after his apparent death, Jason reappears, both of you angry and dejected, teeming with love you don't know what to do with. You missed each other. ~ Updates the first Monday of each month.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,319Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 20

Summary: At what point does a stranger become your friend? When you first talk to them? When you share your secrets with them? And when they drift away, do they once again become a stranger even while knowing your deepest secrets? You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"
